params.name: Fungus Warrior's Proof
params.description: A talent will be activated for the warriors who have this certificate: When you eat orange Fungi, the cap on additional Leadership Stats will be canceled! To hell with the 500-Orange-Fungi limit!
params.ss1:
May the Fungi be with you!
Per 10 FTH-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +1
FTH-Fungi Eaten: 500/500
